property.description: High-frequency PDU session establishment and release churn on N1/N2 interface.

beginning.property:
<event value="COMPUTE" event_id="5" description="NGAP PDU Session Establishment Request (N1/N2) on SMF" boolean_expression="(ngap.procedure_code == 1)&&(ngap.pdu_present == 1)&&(ngap.amf_ue_id != ngap.ran UE_id)"
#mmt_lib_function_1(ngap_message); "/> <event value="COMPUTE" event_id="6" description="NGAP PDU Session Release Request (N1/N2) on SMF" boolean_expression="(ngap.procedure_code == 2)&&(ngap.pdu_present == 0)"
#mmt_lib_function_2(ngap_message); "/>
